cards.back: A requirement modeling strategy that focuses on the flow of interactions between stakeholders, users, and systems to identify and capture the essential requirements
A technique used in flow-oriented modeling to visualize and analyze the flow of value across an organization or system, identifying opportunities for improvement
A type of flow-oriented model that uses separate lanes or channels to represent different stakeholders or systems, showing how they interact with each other
A flow-oriented model that identifies the actors, weapons (or tools), and tasks involved in a system, to understand the interactions and relationships between them
A flow-oriented model that represents the interactions between a system and its users, identifying the use cases and scenarios that meet the system's requirements
